zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair於1476年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair19歲，母親Lady Beatrice Morton32歲。他於1501年3月13日與Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特巴 比阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair于1476年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair19岁，母亲Lady Beatrice Morton32岁。他于1501年3月13日与Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特巴 比阿。

nameMeanings.name: Blair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places in Scotland called Blair, named with Scottish Gaelic blàr (genitive blàir) ‘plain, field’, especially a battlefield (Irish blár). There were families of this name in the Middle Ages taking their names from any of the places called Blair in Dysart parish Fife, Dalry parish Ayrshire, and Blairgowrie in Perthshire.
Americanized form of French   Belair   and   Blais  .

variants.name: Belair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Aime, Auguste, Aurele, Carmelle, Normand, Raoul, Rolande.

French (also Bélair): habitational name from Belair, Bélair or (Le) Bel-Air, names of several places in various parts of France, meaning literally ‘beautiful place’. Compare Belaire , Bellair , Bellaire , and Blair .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair was born in 1476, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair, was 19 and his mother, Lady Beatrice Morton, was 32. He married Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie on 13 March 1501, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1548, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair est né en 1476, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice Morton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie le 13 mars 1501, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1548, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Blair Cemetery, Bac Beag, Argyll and But: Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair 1476 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair 19 und seine Mutter Lady Beatrice Morton 32. Er hat am 13. März 1501 in Edinburgh, Scotland Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1548 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie il 13 marzo 1501, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1548, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blairが1476年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blairは19歳，母Lady Beatrice Mortonは32歳であった。1501年3月13日にスコットランドエディンブルグでLady Elizabeth Montgomerieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで72歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトバック ビーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Blair Cemetery, Bac Beag, Argyll and But: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 바크 브이그
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair(이)가 1476년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Beatrice Morton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1501년 3월 13일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 바크 브이그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair nasceu em 1476, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrice Morton, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie em 13 de março de 1501, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1548, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Blair Cemetery, Bac Beag, Argyll and But: бак биг, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair родился в 1476 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice Morton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie 13 марта 1501 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1548 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности бак биг, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.
